    ☆☆☆☆☆ ☆☆☆☆☆ 5 out of 5 stars.
    · 14 days ago  

    Fantastic experience

    Stayed at Westin for 3 nights. Property is fantastic. Staff are super friendly and super helpful. Food at Tabia restaurant was amazing. Both breakfast and dinner were great and the staff there are super friendly. Special shoutout to the photographer. Took stunning pictures. Overall 10/10 experience. No drawbacks whatsoever.

  5. The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud, Bali
    • Review 1
    • Votes 0
    …
    ☆☆☆☆☆ ☆☆☆☆☆ 4 out of 5 stars.
    · a month ago  

    Getaway in the middle of Ubud jungle

    Generally speaking, it was overall a nice stay in the middle of Ubud jungles. We arrived late at midnight and upon check in were greeted with warm welcome though the introduction was too long for such a late time like 1 am. We were given the villa room with pool, which was awarded by the use of Nightly Upgrade Award certificate. The room itself was spacious, clean and chilling, despite the fact that late checkout at 4 pm was not given, as we were unfriendlily phoned and reminded at 2 pm, telling that the next guests had arrived already. The room was not so soundproof as we could hear the children next door screaming sometimes. The breakfast food was great and the airport pick-up service was good except for the too many conversations the driver wanted to have, and some tour offering. The common space was a bit small for a resort hotel, but the service provided was not bad. Overall, we would consider again staying here for our next trip to Bali.

  8. The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud, Bali
    • Review 1
    • Votes 0
    …
    ☆☆☆☆☆ ☆☆☆☆☆ 5 out of 5 stars.
    · 2 months ago  

    Great place for family stay

    The staff is very warm, helpful and always going above and beyond to make you feel welcomed. The property is beautiful, pool is the highlight. Bit far from anything else as nothing much is available in walking distance however being in ubud almost all services goods are available via grab and gojek.

    Restaurant food options are decent but taste of the ones we had wasn't anything to write home about. Staff in restaurant however make your day by always being there, trying to accommodate specific food requests. For example, indian variety of breakfast was about passable for a local restaurant in bali and not good for the standards of marriott. So hope they can address this as lot of indian tourists visit this place.

Welcome to The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud, Bali

Find your balance at our Ubud, Bali, resort

The Westin Resort and Spa Ubud, Bali, invites guests to a restorative family destination devoted to wellness and personalized attention. From the open lobby and bar, fuel your day on one of three decks... See More boasting views of Ubud Forest and the infinity pool. A sense of well-being extends throughout this Ubud resort, from the 24-hour WestinWORKOUT Fitness Studio to the delights of Heavenly Spa and lifestyle programs at our riverside Wellness Pavilion. Tall Trees elevates ancient recipes into healthy cuisine, while all-day dining at Tabia reflects our Eat Well philosophy through a balanced, wholesome menu. Kids from four to twelve get a dose of adventure with our Westin Family activities. Settle into spacious hotel rooms, suites, and villas filled with natural light and comforts such as a Heavenly Bed, Heavenly Bath, free Wi-Fi, and other essential amenities in Ubud, Bali. Pack light, stay fit, and look forward to a travel experience for the entire family at our Ubud, Indonesia resort. See Less

Unlimited Discoveries Unfold in Bali
Enjoy 10% off stays and 20% off dining in Bali with Marriott Bonvoy. Book by 30 April 2026 for stays until 10 May 2026. Also,earn 2,500 Bonus Points per eligible paid stay plus 1 Bonus Elite Night per brand when you register for the Marriott Bonvoy global promotion.

WHAT TO EXPECT

Plan and Prepare for your Stay

Learn More

Tabia

True to Westin’s Eat Well philosophy of balanced and healthy dining, this Ubud, Bali, restaurant boasts innovative all-day dining and serves authentic dishes that are local to Bali. Enjoy fresh ingredients daily at Tabia.

Explore

Tall Trees

Tall Trees Restaurant is centered around a wood-burning oven with alfresco dining, overlooking the lush forests of Bali. Our Mediterranean restaurant in Ubud serves carefully prepared dishes made from locally sourced and sustainable produce.

Explore

Pool Bar

Located beside our infinity pool near Tall Trees, the Pool Bar serves refreshing beverages and light bites with uninterrupted views of Ubud’s jungle canopy.

Explore

Lobby Bar

Sip crafted cocktails and enjoy light bites at Lobby Bar, our ultimate cocktail bar in Ubud. Unwind by the windows overlooking our breathtaking infinity pool and surrounding landscape.

Explore
Prev
01/04
Next

More Ways to Enjoy Your Stay

Spa

Heavenly Spa by Westin

Treatments at Heavenly Spa will have you relaxed, re-energized, and ready to take on the world. For couples or individuals, our Ubud Spa resort has the ideal treatment for your mind, body, and soul.

Book Learn More

Fitness

Westin Workout

Westin Workout activates the Move Well pillar with a seamless, modern layout and natural aesthetic.

Book Learn More
Photo Coming Soon

Club

Westin Family Kids Club

Westin Family Kids Club at The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud offers enriching experiences inspired by nature and Balinese culture. Thoughtfully designed to spark curiosity and creativity, it provides a balanced space where young explorers can play, learn and grow in a supportive environment.

Look Forward to the Rest

From the plush-top mattress and crisp sateen linens to the richly woven blanket, you can find everything you need to bring the unparalleled comfort of a Heavenly Bed to your home at the Westin Store.

Shop Now

Travel Light. Stay Motivated.

Stay active and feeling your best when traveling. Westin has teamed up with Hyperice and Bala to bring you innovative recovery products and total body strength training equipment during your stay.

Explore

Stay Well with Westin

From our Eat Well Menu to our WestinWORKOUT routes, you’ll find a range of offerings and amenities at our hotels, all designed with your well-being in mind.

Explore

Good Travel with Marriott Bonvoy

Travel with purpose through Good Travel with Marriott Bonvoy. At The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud, Bali, engage with Balinese traditions, rituals, and dance. Building meaningful community connections while enriching your well-being.

Learn More

Frequently Asked Questions

The check-in time at The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud, Bali is 3:00 pm and the check-out time is 12:00 pm.

The pet policy at The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud, Bali is:

Pets Not Allowed

The parking options at The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud, Bali are:

Complimentary On-Site Parking Off-Site Parking: Kengetan 0.5 KM Long Term Parking Complimentary Valet Parking Electric Car Charging Station Complimentary valet and motorcycle parking available. Accessible vehicles accommodated.

The property amenities at The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud, Bali are:

Sustainability Restaurant Fitness Center Spa Outdoor Pool Hot Tub Meeting Space Complimentary Wi-Fi Free Full American and Buffet and Continental and Hot Breakfast Bicycle Rental: Gift Shop Same Day Dry Cleaning On-Site Laundry Room Service 24 Hour Room Service Wake-Up Calls Daily Turndown Service Mobile Key Service Request

Yes, The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud, Bali has in-room Wi-Fi available to hotel guests. Marriott Bonvoy members receive complimentary in-room Internet access when they book direct. Sign up for Marriott Bonvoy for free as you complete your The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud, Bali booking.

The closest airport near The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud, Bali is I Gusti Ngurah Rai International Airport - Bali (DPS). DPS is located approximately 29.4 KM from the hotel.

Yes, The Westin Resort & Spa Ubud, Bali has electric vehicle charging stations (subject to availability).

Privacy Preference Center

  • Your Privacy

  • Strictly Necessary Cookies

  • Functional Cookies

  • Advertising Cookies

  • Analytics Cookies

Your Privacy

Cookies are pieces of data stored on your browser or device that help us provide you a smooth and personalized experience on our web properties. We use different types of cookies, which are outlined below. ​
More information

Strictly Necessary Cookies

Always Active

Strictly Necessary cookies are vital for our (Marriott) property's core functionality, such as enabling booking systems, secure payment processes, and navigation through our hotel's amenities pages.

Functional Cookies

Active

Functional cookies remember user preferences, like language settings, room choices, and past reservations, enhancing user experience by personalizing interactions on our site.

Advertising Cookies

Active

Advertising cookies (also known as Marketing cookies) allow Marriott to log user interactions to deliver targeted ads and promotions, showcasing special offers, events, or loyalty programs.

Analytics Cookies

Active

Analytics Cookies help us improve our websites and mobile apps by collecting and reporting information on how you use them without directly identifying you.
